keypad.xy_move_speed_tooltip: use Alt< and Alt> for speed up/dn
keypad.go_to_tooltip: Move to a new location in one or more axes.
keypad.set_tooltip: Set a new value for the current location of one or more axes.
keypad.authorize_overlay_message: Press authorize button to enable manual controls
keypad.message_placeholder: This is where a message will go
keypad.title_goto_tooltip: Click in box to enter axis location to send tool, or to set a new value for the current location. Zero button sets the current axis position to 0.000
keypad.title_goto_prompt: Select and change a value in order to: 'GoTo' a location or 'Set' a location
keypad.soft_limit_prompt_message: Allow temporary soft-limit override on the
keypad.soft_limit_prompt_note: Override clears when you close the keypad.
keypad.dro_enter_prompt: Move the tool if necessary, then hit "Enter

status.connection_quality_tooltip: This PC's connection quality; Click for tool's Network Manager
status.open_dro_tooltip: Click to open larger Info Display
status.dro_outputs_tooltip: Click to turn Outputs ON/OFF; Outputs #1 and #4 reserved for enabling the spindle in files and Keypad.
status.dro_move_speed_tooltip:
When a file is running, the move-speed/feedrate of the moving axis is
shown. When your tool is idle, the default X/Y speed/feedrate is shown.

Override will decrease or increase the assigned speed in a file (down
to 5%, up to 200%; with 100% being the assigned speed.).
status.dro_spindle_tooltip:
Set spindle RPM. Gray/Black values indicate commanded RPM; Blue
values indicate Achieved RPM.

AMP value displays the spindle load expressed as current in amps.

backup.found_message: FabMo has found a configuration backup made before this update.
backup.restore_question: Would you like to restore your previous configuration?
backup.title: Configuration Backup Available
backup.restoring: Restoring backup... System will restart shortly.

authorize.title: Authorization Required!
authorize.message: To authorize your tool, press and hold the start button for one second.

limit_alert.title: Limit Hit!
limit_alert.message: Limit Switch has been Hit! Quit will temporarily over-ride Limit sensor to allow backing off with Keypad.

interlock_alert.title: Safety Interlock Activated!
interlock_alert.message: You cannot perform the specified action with the safety interlock open.  Please close the safety interlock before Resuming.

drive_fault_alert.title: DRIVE FAULT!
drive_fault_alert.message: A stepper motor driver fault has been detected. The system must be reset before continuing. Check for mechanical issues and then Quit to return to Idle.

lock.title: Stop Input Activated!
lock.message: Please release any Stop Input before continuing.

logout.title: Log Out?
logout.message: Are you sure you want to sign out of this machine?

auth.kicked_out: You have been kicked out from the tool.
auth.not_authenticated: You need to be authenticated to access this page.
auth.kick_confirm: do you want to kick this user out ?

actions.jp_tooltip: Goto Park Location (Macro C#79; Settings in C#210)
actions.pause_feedhold_tooltip:
When a file is running, Pause/Feedhold will execute a controlled stop
allowing the file to be subsequently Resumed or Fully Quit.

If an immediate Emergency Stop (E-Stop) is needed, use the physical
RED Button/Lever to brake and shutdown the equipment. The tool's
position will be lost and your file will need to be restarted.
On some tools, the E-Stop may also be the main power switch.

machine.cannot_arm_from_state: Cannot arm machine for {action} from the {state} state

toolbox.tmpdir_failed: Could not create temp directory for toolbox: {error}
toolbox.tmpfile_write_failed: Could not write toolbox temp file: {error}

general.machine_name_tooltip:
The name of your tool. The tool name will be displayed on the dashboard.
It is used as the Wifi name for AP mode and IP address display.
You can change the name here. The display will update the next time
you start the software.
general.machine_profile_tooltip:
The Machine Profile sets the default values, apps and macros for your tool.
Changing this setting will restart FabMo and reset Configurations.
general.unit_system_tooltip: The distance units that will be used for motion and display and in supported apps.
general.distance_mode_tooltip:
Absolute distance means the tool moves to specified coordinates.
Relative distance means the tool moves from its current position
-by- the specified distance. (Relative is rarely used in modern CNC.)
This setting applies primarily to g-code files. Relative can be
applied if needed in an OpenSBP file by using the [SR] command.
general.language_tooltip:
Display language for the dashboard.
Changing this setting reloads the page so the new
translations take effect.

logging.log_level_tooltip:
Determines how aggressively the tool records diagnostic
information in its log.
This should be set to 'Informational' except in certain
tech support situations.
Setting this value to something other than 'Informational'
may negatively impact tool performance.
logging.status_report_interval_tooltip:
The minimum interval between tool status reports.
A larger number here means position and status displays
will not update as frequently [range 100 - 500].

software.firmware_loading_tooltip:
These are firmware load functions for special use cases:
  Either to upload a firmware file you have been provided by tech support,
  or to reload the current firmare in cases where there is a mismatch
  between the SD card and the Control card (e.g. SD card replacement).
software.firmware_upload: SPECIAL |  Update G2 Firmware with a file provided by tech support
software.firmware_reload: SPECIAL |  Reload G2 Firmware from current FabMo

defaults.explanation: Save the current configuration as your personal default. If a settings file is ever damaged and the most recent backup can't be used, the machine will fall back to your saved default instead of the factory profile.
defaults.save_default: Save current settings as my default

menu.files_tooltip: CUT, Edit, or Preview PART FILES
menu.cuts_tooltip: Simple Cut Commands and Custom Macros
menu.zero_tooltip: Zero an Axis or Axes at its Current Location
menu.values_tooltip: Set or Change Current Configuration Values
menu.design_tooltip: Use a web-based CAD/CAM Design program

workflow.tooltip: This panel accesses the steps for starting-up your tool and Cutting or Managing your Part Files.
workflow.tooltip_checklist_prefix: Click to download a detailed workflow
workflow.home_xy_tooltip: Home the X and Y Axes; C3 or Macro
workflow.set_z_zero_tooltip: Set Z Zero; C2 or Macro2
